creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/publish/> is obscure (I stumbled into it via <https://www.freebsd.org/copyright/daemon/>); it's not linked from its sidebar, and so on. 


> … bibliography. …

* refers to <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/#bibliography> 
            (a non-existent anchor; results in the front page)

* should refer to <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/bibliography/>


Random pick: Absolute BSD (Michael W Lucas), there's a generic link to (outdated, HTTP) <http://www.nostarch.com/>, <https://mwl.io/nonfiction/os#af3e> would be better (more options than No Starch Press alone). 


Notable omissions from the page include … drum roll … 

FreeBSD Journal
<https://freebsdfoundation.org/our-work/journal/>

FreeBSD Mastery: Advanced ZFS
<https://mwl.io/nonfiction/os#fmaz>

… and so on. 


For what it's worth, I shouldn't pay too much attention to updating this page until after there's a sense of the new design for the site; <https://www.freebsd.org/status/report-2022-04-2022-06/#_freebsd_website_revamp_webapps_working_group>.
